# Vendor Packs

**Version:** 1.1  
**Date:** 2026-03-30  
**Status:** Supporting doc

Vendor packs are optional extensions layered on top of the core method.

They can include:

- setup notes for a specific platform
- role-to-tool mappings
- skill files
- prompt patterns
- caveats and limitations

## Rules

- The core method must remain understandable without any vendor pack.
- Vendor packs should mirror the same broad structure when possible.
- Removing a vendor pack should not break navigation through the rest of the repository.

## Available Packs

- [Anthropic](anthropic/README.md)
